# SKIA Forge — Copilot hints (Skia Monorepo alignment)

- Stub and reasoning services in `C:\Skia-FULL\src\services\MoERouterService.ts`, `AdaptiveThinkingEngine.ts`, `TreeOfThoughtService.ts`, `PersistentMemoryService.ts` (and `EvalRunnerService.ts` for baselines). **MoERouterService**, **AdaptiveThinkingEngine**, and **TreeOfThoughtService** are **Phase 0/1 minimal** implementations (see `C:\Skia-FULL\docs\architecture\reasoning-engine.md`). **PersistentMemoryService** remains a **Phase IV** stub. **Do not** implement or “complete” stub methods in master without an explicit product task. See `C:\Skia-FULL\exports\ROADMAP_PHASE_STATUS.md` and `docs/architecture/skia-routing-invariants.md` for where browser traffic is allowed to go (same-origin `/api/...` only; no `backend:4000` in browser code).
